english: The clan leaders met to discuss the development of their community.
luganda: Abakulembeze b'ebika baakuŋŋaana okukubaganya ebirowoozo ku nkulakulana y'ekitundu kyabwe.

english: How is the Kabaka of Buganda doing today?
luganda: Kabaka w'e Buganda alina atya leero?

english: In Buganda culture, respect for elders is very important.
luganda: Mu buwangwa bwa Buganda okuwa abakadde ekitiibwa kikulu nnyo.

english: The royal palace is a symbol of unity in Buganda.
luganda: Olubiri lwa Kabaka kabonero ka bumu mu Buganda.

english: Clan meetings help solve community problems peacefully.
luganda: Enkuŋŋaana z'ebika ziyamba okugonjoola ebizibu by'ekitundu mu mirembe.

english: Traditional ceremonies preserve Buganda history and identity.
luganda: Emikolo gy'obuwangwa gikuuma ebyafaayo n'endagamuntu ya Buganda.

english: People respect the Kabaka as the leader of Buganda.
luganda: Abantu bassa ekitiibwa mu Kabaka ng'omukulembeze wa Buganda.

english: The council discussed how to support youth in the kingdom.
luganda: Lukiiko lwakubaganya ebirowoozo ku ngeri y'okuyamba abavubuka mu bwakabaka.

english: Our elders teach us to speak with respect.
luganda: Abakadde baffe batuyigiriza okwogera n'ekitiibwa.

english: The clan gathered to welcome visitors.
luganda: Ekika kyakuŋŋaana okwaniriza abagenyi.

english: The Kabaka encouraged unity among all clans.
luganda: Kabaka yakubiriza obumu mu bika byonna.

english: Respectful greetings are part of Buganda identity.
luganda: Okulamusa n'ekitiibwa kitundu ku ndagamuntu ya Buganda.

english: The community worked together to clean the well.
luganda: Abantu b'ekitundu baakolera wamu okuyonja oluzzi.

english: Children were taught the history of Buganda.
luganda: Abaana baayigirizibwa ebyafaayo bya Buganda.

english: The ceremony began with traditional songs.
luganda: Omukolo gwatandika n'ennyimba z'obuwangwa.

english: The leaders called for peace in the community.
luganda: Abakulembeze baayita ku mirembe mu kitundu.

english: The Kabaka's message emphasized discipline and service.
luganda: Obubaka bwa Kabaka bwanyweza empisa n'okuweereza.

english: Families attended the cultural celebration.
luganda: Amaka gaabeerawo ku mukolo gw'obuwangwa.

english: The kingdom values wisdom from elders.
luganda: Obwakabaka butwala amagezi g'abakadde ng'ekikulu.

english: Traditional values guide our daily lives.
luganda: Empisa z'obuwangwa zitulagiriza mu bulamu bwa buli lunaku.

english: The youth learned proverbs from their grandparents.
luganda: Abavubuka baayiga enfumo okuva eri bajjajjaabwe.

english: The village welcomed the new clan head.
luganda: Ekyalo kyayaniriza omukulu omuggya ow'ekika.

english: People met at the palace for community dialogue.
luganda: Abantu baakuŋŋaanira ku lubiri okukubaganya ebirowoozo ku by'ekitundu.

english: The king reminded everyone to preserve culture.
luganda: Kabaka yajjukiza bonna okukuuma obuwangwa.

english: Women's groups supported families during the ceremony.
luganda: Ebibiina by'abakyala byayambako amaka mu kiseera ky'omukolo.

english: The elders resolved the dispute with fairness.
luganda: Abakadde baagonjoola empaka mu bwenkanya.

english: The clan protected sacred sites in the community.
luganda: Ekika kyakuuma ebifo ebitukuvu mu kitundu.

english: Buganda traditions encourage responsibility and respect.
luganda: Ennono za Buganda zikubiriza obuvunaanyizibwa n'ekitiibwa.

english: The royal drums announced the start of the gathering.
luganda: Engoma za Kabaka zaalanga okutandika kw'enkuŋŋaana.

english: Community leaders planned development projects together.
luganda: Abakulembeze b'ekitundu baateekateeka pulojekiti z'enkulakulana wamu.
